definition: Three mechanically certain margin headwinds converge 2027-2029 for hyperscalers: depreciation cliff ($70-120B delta = 300-500bp), useful-life benefit exhaustion ($8-12B fully captured), and rising energy costs (data center electricity 4-5% to 8-12% of US generation). Combined: 400-700bp operating margin pressure.
evidence: Depreciation: $200-250B annual capex at 5yr/6yr life = ~$170-210B D&A by 2028 vs ~$80-100B current
Useful-life benefit: $8-12B fully captured, no further extensions possible
Energy: PJM capacity 10x, data center electricity rising from 4-5% to 8-12% of US generation
open_questions: Whether AI revenue growth could offset margin compression in the denominator
Exact timing of convergence depends on capex trajectory 2025-2027
